sets.name: Base Set
sets.blurb: The OG set that started it all. Holos here are grail-tier.

sets.name: Celebrations
sets.blurb: 25th anniversary mini-set. Small but every card is iconic.

sets.name: Pokemon GO
sets.blurb: Crossover with Pokemon GO mobile game. Mewtwo VSTAR rules this set.

sets.name: Scarlet & Violet 151
sets.blurb: The Kanto throwback set. Charizard ex and Mew ex are the chases.

sets.name: Obsidian Flames
sets.blurb: Charizard-heavy set — Charizard ex SIR is the chase.

sets.name: Paldean Fates
sets.blurb: Shiny-focused. Charizard ex shiny and Mew ex shiny are the grails.

sets.name: Surging Sparks
sets.blurb: Pikachu ex set. Pikachu ex SIR is the most-hunted card of 2024.

sets.name: Prismatic Evolutions
sets.blurb: Eevee evolutions everywhere. Umbreon ex and Sylveon ex are top chase.
